title: equisetum heleocharis f. uliginosum
intro: Equisetum heleocharis f. uliginosum, also known as marsh horsetail, is a plant species belonging to the Equisetum genus, which is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the ancient class Equisetopsida. The medicinal properties of Equisetum heleocharis f. uliginosum include its high silica content, which is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of using this plant include its ability to treat urinary issues, improve bone health, and reduce inflammation. Equisetum heleocharis f. uliginosum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
